properties.name: Pomeroy Forest
properties.description: A magical forest park featuring the 'Renardine' fairy trail and a fantastic wooden play area for children.

properties.name: Grange Park Omagh
properties.description: A spacious urban park in Omagh with a modern playground and an outdoor gym for parents.

properties.name: Gortin Glen Forest Park
properties.description: A destination park with a massive multi-age playground, deer enclosures, and family mountain bike trails.

properties.name: An Creagán
properties.description: Explore the wild bogland with forest trails and a river walk. Great for bikes and buggies.

properties.name: Round Lake
properties.description: A peaceful lakeside spot in Fivemiletown. Perfect for a walk around the water followed by a play in the park.

properties.name: Davagh Road
properties.description: Home to the Dark Sky Observatory. Features wooded walks and world-class mountain biking trails.

properties.name: Dungannon Park
properties.description: A 70-acre park with a massive lake. It offers a great playground, tennis courts, and plenty of space for family picnics.

properties.name: Drum Manor Forest Park
properties.description: Famous for its vibrant gardens and manor ruins. The large playground is a hit with kids of all ages.

properties.name: Glenarm Castle Gardens
properties.description: Beautiful walled gardens with plenty of hidden corners for kids to discover. Check out the Pizza Pavilion!

properties.name: Ramore Head
properties.description: Dramatic coastal walks in Portrush. Great for exploring rock pools and watching the waves crash against the cliffs.

properties.name: Ormeau Park
properties.description: Belfast's oldest municipal park. Large playgrounds, eco-trails, and wide paths perfect for learning to cycle.

properties.name: V36 Adventure Play Area
properties.description: A massive, modern adventure park in Newtownabbey with climbing frames, zip wires, and a skate park.

properties.name: Wallace Park
properties.description: The 'Jewel of Lisburn'. Features a fantastic playground, a duck pond, and safe, flat walking paths.

properties.name: Cave Hill Country Park
properties.description: Home to Belfast Castle. The playground here is excellent, and the hike to McArt's Fort offers the best view in the city.

properties.name: People's Park Ballymena
properties.description: A lovely park in the heart of Ballymena with a lake, large playground, and well-maintained flower gardens.

properties.name: Antrim Lough Shore Park
properties.description: Situated on the banks of Lough Neagh. A beautiful spot for a walk, with a great playground and cafe.

properties.name: Mo Mowlam Play Park
properties.description: Located within the Stormont Estate. This is one of the best inclusive playgrounds in NI, catering to all abilities.

properties.name: Seapark Bay
properties.description: Beach meets park! A large grassy area with a seaside playground and views across Belfast Lough.

properties.name: Hillsborough Forest Park
properties.description: Recently upgraded with a fantastic digital sculpture trail and a large, modern lakeside playground.

properties.name: Montalto Estate Play Park
properties.description: A multi-award winning adventure playground designed to look like a treehouse. A must-visit destination.

properties.name: WWT Castle Espie
properties.description: Feed the ducks and explore the wetlands. Great nature-based play areas and bird watching for kids.

properties.name: Kilbroney Park
properties.description: Home to the Narnia Trail! A beautiful park in Rostrevor with mountain views and a great playground.

properties.name: Delamont Country Park
properties.description: Features the longest miniature railway in Ireland and a massive adventure playground with views of the lough.

properties.name: Castlewellan Forest Park
properties.description: Home to the Peace Maze and a brilliant play area. Perfect for family walks around the lake.

properties.name: Tollymore Forest Park
properties.description: Famous for its stepping stones and forest trails. A great place for families to explore the 'real' Narnia.

properties.name: Castle Archdale
properties.description: Lakeside trails, WWII history, and a great playground. A Fermanagh favorite for sunny days.

properties.name: Round 'O' Park
properties.description: Enniskillen's main riverside park. Duck feeding, boat trips, and a well-equipped playground.

properties.name: Loughgall Country Park
properties.description: Set in a rural estate with a large lake, forest walks, and a quiet, safe play area.

properties.name: Maghery Country Park
properties.description: Located on the shores of Lough Neagh. Woodland walks and a pleasant playground in a quiet setting.

properties.name: Gosford Forest Park
properties.description: Incredible 'All Out Play' adventure playground with giant castles and zip lines. Great for older kids too.

properties.name: Peatlands Park
properties.description: Unique bogland park with a narrow-gauge railway and miles of walking trails through the woods.

properties.name: Scarva Park
properties.description: A lovely village park beside the canal. Famous for its tea rooms and the beautiful towpath walk.

properties.name: Edenvilla Park
properties.description: Home to the Secret Garden and a fantastic bird sanctuary. A quiet, peaceful park with a good playground.

properties.name: Oxford Island
properties.description: Nature reserve on Lough Neagh. Great for bird watching, woodland walks, and a lakeside picnic.

properties.name: Slieve Gullion Forest Park
properties.description: Includes the 'Giant's Lair' adventure walk—a magical trail through the forest for little imaginations.

properties.name: Lurgan Park
properties.description: The second largest park in Ireland! Features a huge lake, miles of paths, and a great playground.

properties.name: Tannaghmore Gardens
properties.description: Farm animals, rare breeds, and a massive playground. A brilliant free day out for the whole family.

properties.name: Ballyarnett Country Park
properties.description: A spacious park in Derry with a focus on biodiversity and outdoor family fun.

properties.name: Limavady Play Park
properties.description: A high-quality, accessible playground in the heart of Limavady designed for all children.

properties.name: Diversity Park
properties.description: Located at Flowerfield Arts Centre. A fully inclusive play area with equipment for children of all abilities.

properties.name: Claudy Country Park
properties.description: Lovely riverside walks and forest trails in a quiet setting. Perfect for a family dander.

properties.name: Ness Country Park
properties.description: Home to the highest waterfall in NI! A stunning wooded park with dramatic walks and bridges.

properties.name: Ballyronan Marina
properties.description: A beautiful lough-side setting with a newly refurbished playground and forest 'wood-spirit' walk.

properties.name: Iniscarn Forest
properties.description: A hidden gem for forest walks and exploring the foothills of the Sperrins.
